task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded into the workbook.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sample Order Lines' in the Data Elements pane on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Line Chart visualization has been created on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Line Chart visualization on the main canvas and the Line Chart icon selected in the visualization type menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Order Date' at a monthly granularity is used for the X-axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Order Date' (specifically showing Month or a monthly hierarchy level) in the Category (X-axis) section of the Grammar pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that the chart is broken down by 'Product Category'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Product Category' in the Color section of the Grammar pane, and multiple lines on the chart corresponding to different categories.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Sales' is plotted as a cumulative running sum on the Y-axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sales' in the Values (Y-axis) section of the Grammar pane with an indication of a calculation (like 'RSUM' or 'Running Sum'). The chart lines should show a strictly non-decreasing cumulative upward trend.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workbook is saved as 'Cumulative_Growth_Analysis' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'Cumulative_Growth_Analysis' at the top of the Oracle Analytics window, or a 'Save As' dialog showing the file being saved to the Documents folder as 'Cumulative_Growth_Analysis.dva'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop graphical user interface to build the visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for mouse clicks, drag-and-drop actions in the Grammar pane, and menu selections within the Oracle Analytics application, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the visualization is genuinely rendered by Oracle Analytics.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart should appear within the Oracle Analytics canvas with standard UI elements (Grammar pane, Data pane, Properties pane) active, not as a static image opened in an image viewer.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply copy a pre-existing .dva file into the Documents folder.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the actual step-by-step creation of the chart and the use of the 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog within Oracle Analytics.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is 'Cumulative_Growth_Analysis.dva' saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'. The calculation for the cumulative trend must use the 'RSUM' function on the 'Sales' measure. The breakdown dimension is 'Product Category'.
